tool_response.stdout:
model Order {
  id           String   @id @default(uuid())
  type         String
  studioId     String
  csUserId     String
  companionId  String?
  customerId   String
  dispatchType String
  status       String   @default("PENDING")
  amount       Float
  gameName     String
  serviceType  String   @default("PLAY_WITH")
  duration     Float?
  customFields Json?
  isOnline     Boolean  @default(true)
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
  grabbedAt       DateTime?
  contactStatus   String?
  screenshotUrl   String?
  scheduledAt     DateTime?
  notes           String?

  studio       Studio        @relation(fields: [studioId], references: [id])
  csUser       User          @relation("CSUser", fields: [csUserId], references: [id])
  companion    Companion?    @relation(fields: [companionId], references: [id])
  customer     Customer      @relation(fields: [customerId], references: [id])
  transactions Transaction[]
}

model Customer {
  id                  String   @id @default(uuid())
  studioId            String
  customerCode        String   @unique
  wechatId            String
  companionId         String?
  platform            String?
  platformAccount     String?
  consultDate         DateTime?
  wechatAddDate       DateTime?
  isAccountBanned     Boolean  @default(false)
  isDeletedByCustomer Boolean  @default(false)
